summary: Comprehensive testing of Admin Dashboard and Redeem Button features completed. All 12 backend tests passed. Frontend UI correctly displays Admin page with login, stats, tabs (Overview, Platform Earnings, Transactions, Users), charts (Cash Flow, Platform Revenue). Portfolio page correctly shows Redeem button with 5% fee breakdown dialog.
passed_tests: Admin stats endpoint returns data with valid key (X-Admin-Key header)
Admin stats endpoint rejects requests without key (403)
Admin stats endpoint rejects invalid key (403)
Admin earnings endpoint returns platform earnings data
Admin transactions endpoint returns transaction audit log
Admin users endpoint returns user management data
Admin cashflow endpoint returns cash flow overview
Redeem endpoint requires authentication (401)
Redeem endpoint returns 404 for invalid video
Redeem endpoint returns 400 when user has no shares
Buy and redeem flow works with correct 5% fee calculation
Platform earning is recorded in database after redemption
Admin login page loads with key input field
Admin dashboard loads after correct key entry
Admin stats cards display: Total Users, Total Videos, Platform Earnings, Transactions
Admin tabs work: Overview, Platform Earnings, Transactions, Users
Cash Flow Overview chart displays data
Platform Revenue chart displays data
Platform Earnings Log table shows redemption fees
Transaction Audit Log shows all transaction types
User Management table shows user details
Portfolio page shows Sell and Redeem buttons for holdings
Redeem dialog shows correct fee breakdown (5% platform fee)
Redeem dialog shows Net to wallet calculation
Redeem vs Sell explanation text is displayed
critical_code_review_comments: Admin authentication uses simple key-based auth (X-Admin-Key header) - appropriate for MVP
5% platform fee correctly calculated on gross redemption value
Platform earnings correctly recorded in platform_earnings collection
Redeem dialog clearly explains difference between Redeem (5% fee, all shares) vs Sell (no fee, partial shares)
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data - 6 users, 10 videos, 25 transactions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Dashboard and Redeem features fully implemented and tested. Admin page accessible at /admin with key 'ideaground_admin_2026'. Redeem button on Portfolio page opens dialog showing 5% platform fee breakdown. Platform earnings are recorded in platform_earnings collection. Use POST /api/auth/demo-login for authenticated sessions.

redeem_button.location: Portfolio page - next to each holding
